features: Designed to nourish and protect your locks
Create your perfect look with the VO5 styling range.
description: Product Description VO5®, the inventor of hotoil, brings you Give Me Moisture shampoo, infused with luscious Vital Oils, designed to nourish and protect your locks. With 5 vital oils: Argan, Jojoba, Apricot, Avocado and Grapeseed oil Ingredients Aqua Sodium Laureth Sulfate Cocamidopropyl Betaine Sodium Chloride Glycerin Hydrolysed Pearl Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil Persea Gratissima Oil Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride Magnesium Nitrate PEG-45M Parfum Mica Maris Sal Disodium EDTA Glycol Distearate Dimethiconol PEG-20 Castor Oil TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate TEA-Sulfate Carbomer Magnesium Chloride PPG-12 Silica Sodium Sulfate Citric Acid Sodium Hydroxide Triethanolamine DMDM Hydantoin Methylchloroisothiazolinone Methylisothiazolinone Phenoxyethanol Sodium Benzoate Benzyl Alcohol Hexyl Cinnamal Limonene Linalool CI 77891 Directions Directions: massage into wet hair, lather & feel the shampoo, with Vital Oils, do its job. Rinse thoroughly. Follow up with VO5 Give Me Moisture conditioner for an extra boost of hydration. You're ready to style! Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with clean water. Box Contains 1 x VO5 Give Me Moisture Shampoo 400ml Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
